title: Numbers row: 1-5 (left hand)
description: Reach to the numbers row — left side
tips: Numbers row is FAR — biggest stretch on the keyboard
Same finger as the column letter (1=pinky, 2=ring, etc.)
Use Number Row, NOT numpad — numpad is a different skill

character_tips.anna: Numbers stretch FAR up. Use the same finger as the column letter.
character_tips.maxim: Numbers on the main row, not numpad. The latter is a different skill.
character_tips.klavochka: Counting up to five, my dear — like steps! 🪜
